name: Chocolate Hazelnut Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs CREAM CHEESE, unwrapped and warmed in microwave for 2 minutes on high
5 JUMBO EGGS, out of shell and warmed in microwave for 25 seconds
6 oz MILK CHOCOLATE with HAZELNUTS, in chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix and pat the crushed hazelnut cookies into the bottom and up sides of a 10-inch springform pan.
2. Melt the butter and mix it with the melted white chocolate. Combine this mixture with the warmed cream cheese until smooth.
3. Warm the eggs in the microwave for 25 seconds, then add them to the cream cheese mixture and stir until combined.
4. Stir in the softened butter, hazelnut liqueur, vanilla, and ground nutmeg.
5. Fold in the chopped milk chocolate with nuts.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and refrigerate until set.
